history.text: Constituent country within the Kingdom of the Netherlands ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Suriname became independent from the Kingdom of the Netherlands, marking a key step in modern statehood.

worthSeeing.title: Central Suriname Reserve:
worthSeeing.text: UNESCO rainforest reserve covering nearly 12% of the country, one of the world's last pristine tropical forests.

worthSeeing.title: Paramaribo:
worthSeeing.text: Unique wooden colonial city blending Dutch, African, and Asian architecture, UNESCO-listed.

worthSeeing.title: River Expeditions:
worthSeeing.text: Multi-day canoe trips on the Suriname River into deep jungle.
